lint.command: npm --prefix "D:\codespace\docman-plus-ui" run lint:eslint -- src/views/docman/document/index.vue src/api/docman/document.ts src/api/docman/types.ts

blockingIssues.description: The backend builds viewer `src` as a path-only URL, so an independently deployed external viewer resolves content requests against its own origin instead of the backend that issued the ticket.
Preview content delivery can surface concrete local storage paths through propagated `ServiceException` messages, violating the no-storage-leakage contract.
The frontend preview action reads `res.url` instead of `res.data.url`, so successful `viewer-url` responses do not navigate to the external viewer.

The integration guide omits the current same-origin/reverse-proxy/auth-forwarding requirement implied by the relative, auth-protected preview `src`, so the documented standalone deployment guidance is incomplete.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the sibling plus-ui response-envelope convention: `src/utils/request.ts` resolves `R.ok(...)` endpoints as `res.data`, while paginated list endpoints expose `rows` and `total` at top level.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The frontend preview feature consumed `viewer-url` as `res.url` and failed. Reviewer evidence cites `D:/codespace/docman-plus-ui/src/utils/request.ts` and neighboring docman views that read `res.data`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the external viewer contract by stating whether `viewer-url.src` must be an absolute backend-origin URL or whether workers may rely on same-origin/reverse-proxy deployment assumptions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both the backend delivery feature and docs feature treated `src` as a relative path while mission docs also described the viewer as independently deployed on another origin.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add Windows Exec guidance for starting `.factory/init.sh` and keeping the `docman-plus-ui` Vite dev server alive for browser validation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviewer reports and worker transcripts show repeated Windows startup issues for `.factory/init.sh` and `docman-plus-ui`, leading to incomplete browser validation attempts.
